title: POV: You Just Unlocked Ritual x Masonry
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~10s. Featured brand: Ritual. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DSLr0gzCHof). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry POV reel for Ritual vitamins. Every frame is generated in Masonry following the 'Make in Masonry' step, then cut fast per the Edit / Transition / SFX direction. The hook is a relatable lifestyle portrait, then the screen floods with 'Yes, that's Masonry' over a floating capsule, a capsule pile, a tweezer shot, a branded bottle card. Every shot looks like a six-figure studio day, all generated.
audio: Upbeat, punchy trending audio with a clear beat drop at 2s. Audio-only: no voiceover. The 'Yes, that's Masonry' lockup stays in a fixed position; pop on every product reveal.

beats.ost: POV: You finally learned how to generate your brand content with Masonry
beats.super: Bold sans, top-third, snaps in and builds across both frames.
beats.visual: Two frames: woman holding a Ritual capsule up playfully, then tilting it toward camera. Bright, relatable lifestyle energy.
beats.masonry: Upload Ritual's Essential capsule and bottle to the Masonry product library. Prompt 'relatable lifestyle portrait, woman holding capsule up to the light, bright clean tone, 9:16.' Generate the hook.
beats.edit: Quick energetic cut between the two lifestyle frames, slight bounce.
beats.transition: Hard cut on the beat drop.
beats.sfx: Track drops in; a pop / click on the POV text.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-1: 'POV: You finally learned how to generate content with AI' lifestyle hook.

beats.super: Mono accent lockup, snaps in; keep this exact position for the whole run.
beats.visual: Ritual Essential capsule floating on a clean light-gray background, crisp detail. Two cuts.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'single capsule floating, clean light-gray seamless, studio product light.' Generate the first reveal.
beats.edit: Floating capsule with a fast spin or bounce; two quick cuts.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2-3: 'Yes, that's AI' on the floating green capsule.

beats.visual: Minimalist flat-lay: Ritual packaging and small print card on a neutral background.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'minimalist flat-lay, Ritual packaging plus print card, neutral background.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4: 'Yes, that's AI' on the packaging flat-lay.

beats.visual: Natural ingredient macro: rich green algae texture, hyperreal close-up.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'natural ingredient macro, algae texture, rich green.'
beats.sfx: Pop; a subtle organic texture sound.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 5: 'Yes, that's AI' on the natural ingredient macro.

beats.visual: Model close-up placing a capsule on her tongue, freckled skin, warm natural light.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'model close-up placing capsule on tongue, freckled skin, warm light.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 6: 'Yes, that's AI' on the lifestyle model close-up.

beats.visual: Capsule pile macro: dozens of Ritual capsules filling the frame, each catching light.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'capsule pile macro filling frame, each catching light.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'Yes, that's AI' on the capsule pile macro.

beats.visual: Tweezer holding a single capsule over a plain background: precise, minimal, catalog-quality.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'tweezer holding one capsule over plain seamless.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8: 'Yes, that's AI' on the product tweezer shot.

beats.super: Same lockup, final hold; add a small Ritual plus Masonry tag.
beats.visual: Final frame: Ritual bottle and branded product card on a warm cream background. Full brand system, no shoot.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'Ritual bottle plus branded product card, warm cream background.' Each shot above is one Masonry generation; cut them fast on the beat.
beats.edit: Bottle and card hero, settle. Optional quick logo.
beats.transition: Hard cut, hold on the last beat.
beats.sfx: Final pop and a button-up sting; the beat resolves.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 9: 'Yes, that's AI' on the final branded bottle and card.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Ritual's products (Essential capsule, bottle, packaging) into the Masonry product library and set the minimalist brand palette. (2) Generate each beat with its 'Make in Masonry' prompt: these are fast single-product generations, so batch them. (3) Edit per beat following the Super style, Edit / Motion, Transition and SFX direction; keep the 'Yes, that's Masonry' lockup in a fixed position, cut hard on the beat, audio-only with no voiceover. Ritual is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
refsummary: The original (mobileeditingclub) is a fast 10s POV reel: 'POV: You finally learned how to generate content with AI,' then the screen floods with 'Yes, that's AI' over a rapid run of studio-perfect product shots. Audio-only, every cut on the beat. Watch it for the rapid-fire POV rhythm; we keep it and swap 'AI' for Masonry.
story: Same fast POV structure, reframed to Masonry with Ritual as the demo brand. Arc: HOOK, a relatable lifestyle POV, you finally learned to generate your brand content in Masonry. PROOF FLOOD, 'Yes, that's Masonry' over a floating capsule, a capsule pile, a tweezer macro, a branded bottle card, each looking like a six-figure studio day. The viewer should feel the speed and think every one of those polished shots was generated, not shot.
takeaway: A wellness brand can generate a full run of studio-perfect product shots in Masonry, fast, with no studio day at all.
